name: The Dalmore 12 Year Old
subtitle: Single Malt Scotch Whisky · Highland, Scotland · 40% ABV
description: Aged in American white oak ex-bourbon casks, then finished in González Byass oloroso sherry casks. Rich and approachable — citrus marmalade, dark chocolate, a hint of walnut. One of the most reliably satisfying Highland malts on the shelf.
imageAlt: The Dalmore 12 Year Old Single Malt Scotch Whisky
